Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/generate \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"who":"a curious fox named Maple","where":"in a magical forest","how":"they find a hidden library"}' 2>&1 | python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('story_id:', data['story_id']\)
print\('page_number:', data['page_number']\)
print\('text preview:', data['page_text'][:150], '...'\)
print\('image_url length:', len\(data['page_image']\), 'chars'\)
print\('pages in memory:', len\(data['memory']['pages']\)\)
print\('running_summary:', data['memory']['running_summary'][:100], '...'\)
")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/generate \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"story_id":"d51ace454397","user_action":"Maple touches the glowing stone with her paw"}' 2>&1 | python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('page_number:', data['page_number']\)
print\('text preview:', data['page_text'][:150], '...'\)
print\('has image:', len\(data['page_image']\) > 0\)
print\('pages total:', len\(data['memory']['pages']\)\)
print\('location:', data['memory']['current_state']['location']\)
")
